name: Tournedos Medicis
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bread slices in 1 1/2 tablespoons butter until brown on both sides. Remove to a warm dish.
2. Add 1 tablespoon of butter to a hot pan and cook the steaks over high heat for 3 minutes on each side.
3. Place each steak on a prepared slice of bread.
4. Add 1/2 tablespoon of butter to the pan where the steaks were cooked, sauté the mushrooms, and stir in the wine to deglaze the pan. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Pour over the steaks and serve immediately.
